response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a type of food that contains proteins which can trigger allergic reactions in some people  
allergic reactions can cause symptoms such as hives or difficulty breathing  
these reactions are not related to the physical properties of the food  
the physical properties of peanuts do not make them harmful to live underwater  

Sec. 2  
people who are allergic to peanuts can live underwater without any issues  
the allergic reaction is based on the immune system response to the proteins in peanuts  
the physical properties of peanuts do not affect their ability to be consumed or handled underwater  
the ability to live underwater is not related to the allergic reaction to peanuts
